ps.希望作者大大可以写段则和温栩的番外[爱慕][爱慕]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752973015,"group_id":"7513921270543551512","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"首先要开心，剩下的无所谓","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2CDbxEI78v564fE4lwPXSA=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/57e10e6453d64da4acf769d14faa9aa8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795359&x-signature=TrtD4nwFuitFKNLj4vSfh016Qwo%3D","user_id":"519390977332429","user_name":"–不眠岛–"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"519390977332429","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7513921270543551512","book_info":{"abstract":"【1v1+双洁+AB+攻上位+暧昧拉扯+小甜饼】
又争又抢过度长嘴坏心眼Alpha攻 x 温顺乖巧礼貌话少小可怜Beta受
·
温颂是没有信息素的Beta，在宴会上见到男朋友的顶级Alpha好兄弟关睢的第一眼印象是——“不好招惹，要远离”
没想到还没远离，一场阴差阳错的意外让本来没有交集的两人发生关系。
·
关睢身为顶级Alpha向来洁身自好，却在朋友为他举办的回国接风宴看上对方的男朋友。
得知两人感情形同虚设、渣男出轨后趁虚而入。
利用易感期与被暗算的温颂深入交流；
制造巧妙的偶遇；
用匿名短信拆穿渣男出轨等一系列上不得台面的手段。
·
终于，墙角好不容易有所松动。
有一回，关睢情不自禁想和温颂接吻。
后者偏过脑袋说：
“——不能亲，我还没分手。”
关睢二话不说用点手段让渣男为公司去和其他Omega联姻。
急忙把自己扶正。
-
再后来，关睢因意外出了车祸失去关于温颂所有的记忆。
消失整整三年时间。
当两人再次见面，Alpha“重操旧业”继续挖墙角。
这一次，
挖的是自己的墙角。
·
失忆后小剧场：
关睢：“你结婚了吗？”
温颂：“结了。”
关睢：“方便离了吗？我也想和你结婚。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/53fb04be40c2d2730a5d8b0f45d5dc70","author":"初日见雾","author_id":"","book_id":"7513921270543551512","book_name":"那是你老婆？抢过来就是我的了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7513921295579693592","read_count":"54336","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"287031"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"136","tags":"双男主,甜宠,双洁,现代,1v1,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ee46418ecfaeb104148caca1ffaf911e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445603&x-signature=8zbeDCi3bUD5IVuQtdvIJ9fmfDs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1447401762340615","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"81"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231826434CFE74E5B393F798AEA9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读46分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":169,"forwarded_count":0,"lis
